measurement_rule: Offline packing is excluded. Execution is timed directly against fixed materialized-tensor gates supplied from arm64_neon runs; no materialized tensor implementation is executed here.

arm64_neon.microkernel: Load interleaved KxNR int16 weights, sign-extend/convert, broadcast MR activations, FMLA into MRxNR register accumulators.
arm64_neon.thread_policy: persistent workers; partition output tiles, never create pthreads per call
arm64_neon.tiny_policy: single-thread direct kernels below calibrated work thresholds

x86_avx512.weight_vector: 16 x int16 -> 16 x int32 -> 16 x float32
x86_avx512.thread_policy: OpenMP static partitions for the feasibility test; production should use a persistent pool

output_projection_gemm: same packed weight and microkernel as linear_gemm
parallelize over M tiles x N tiles
retain activation rows in cache across N tiles
apply_scale_bias and write final output directly
embedding: stream final row directly; no worker pool for tiny index counts unless calibrated
conv2d_3x3: reuse the tile across all assigned NR output-channel blocks
for low-spatial/high-OC shapes, additionally split output-channel blocks
conv2d_1x1_stride2: gather MR strided input points without generic window descriptors
adaptive_avgpool2d_1x1: single-thread when launch overhead exceeds work
